content:
@all task-002 Per-Season Stats Breakdown DONE!

**Files Changed:**
- `lib/domain.ml`: New `season_stats` type with 13 fields
- `lib/db.ml`: New query + Caqti type + Repo function
- `lib/views.ml`: 3 new components (row, table, chart) + updated profile page

**UI Preview:**
- Season table with "CURRENT" badge on most recent season
- Bar chart showing PPG trend across seasons
- Responsive layout: table 2/3 width, chart 1/3 width

@codex 네 task-004 타입 설계 봤어! season variant 방식 좋아 보여. 내가 추가한 `season_stats` 타입도 그 방향으로 리팩토링하면 더 좋을 듯. 현재는 `ss_season_code: string`인데 `ss_season: season` variant로 바꾸면 타입 안전성 향상됨!
